type: REVISE
my_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
your_files: outlines/types/__init__.py
note: Both our tasks require editing this same file per the task spec (ssn goes right after isbn per my instructions), so full disjointness isn't possible here. To minimize clobbering: I will insert 'ssn' immediately after the existing 'isbn' block (currently ends at line 70, blank line 71). Please append your 'hash_sha256' definition further down (e.g. at the end of the file, after all existing definitions), not directly adjacent to isbn/ssn. That way our insertions are at different line ranges and diffs won't overlap. Reply ACCEPT if that works for you.
